arts.ttl: Derby County make changes as new boy makes debut at Norwich City after Paul Warne exit
arts.sum: With first-team coach Matt Hamshaw placed in charge after Warne's exit yesterday, new signing Sondre Langas started following his £4m switch from Viking FK last weekend. Liam Thompson is also given a place in the Derby team while Callum Elder and Ryan Nyambe are fit enough to take their place on the bench after groin and hip problems respectively.

arts.ttl: MATCHDAY LIVE: Norwich City v Derby County
arts.sum: Follow live updates and join the debate at Carrow Road as Norwich City face managerless Derby County in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Boss hoping Harrison Armstrong can follow in footsteps of Everton 'great' honed at Derby County
arts.sum: Yet before he could don his boots for the struggling Championship side, who sit third bottom and two points shy of safety, Derby announced they'd dismissed Paul Warne just one day before their game against Norwich City. In his pre-match press conference ahead of Everton's FA Cup fourth-round clash with Bournemouth, Toffees' boss Moyes reflected on the loan system and its benefits, citing Leon Osman as a prime example.

arts.ttl: The eight transfer deals Derby County completed in the January window
arts.sum: Derby added four signings to the squad after the January window opened while there were departures too with Eiran Cashin being the headline exit after he moved to Brighton for a fee of £9m. Derby County completed the January transfer window with four signings as they wrapped up their business for the final time this season.

arts.ttl: Six Derby County players who didn't leave the club in January but could this summer
arts.sum: But now the window has shut, Derby will soon start to focus on the summer and there are six players whose current deals expire in the summer but stayed with the club during the window. The academy graduate has played 20 games for Derby this season in all competitions, but is out of contract at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: What Paul Warne said about Harrison Armstrong before Derby County axe
arts.sum: Paul Warne has revealed how Derby County tried to sign Harrison Armstrong last summer and says the Everton loanee has a "real confidence" in the way he plays. Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: New frontrunner emerges in latest odds to replace Paul Warne as Derby County manager
arts.sum: Leyton Orient boss Richie Wellens has emerged as an early frontrunner to replace Paul Warne as Derby County boss. Early betting had the likes of Steven Gerrard (9/4), Rob Edwards (5/1) and Steve Cooper (5/1) leading the way to take over as Rams boss.

arts.ttl: Derby County told sacking came a year too late for some as tough Paul Warne verdict delivered
arts.sum: “We need everybody to pull together in the same direction because at the end of the day, the fans have wanted this and a lot of people wanted this last season as well, even though Paul Warne got Derby County promoted. Ex-Rams goalie Steele told BBC Radio Derby he was "surprised by the timing" of Warne’s dismissal a day before Derby face a tough game at Norwich City (Saturday, 3pm kick-off), but not by the decision itself.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne created memories to last a lifetime - but fate dealt him a cruel hand
arts.sum: But Warne's legacy as Derby manager will be that promotion he delivered last season, the first the club had tasted in 17 years. No team ever thrashed Derby, but Warne, no matter how hard he tried, couldn't turn slender margins in his favour, and he was not helped by players missing big chances.

arts.ttl: Derby County announce interim boss after sacking of Paul Warne
arts.sum: Hamshaw, 43, followed Warne to Pride Park from hometown club Rotherham United in September 2022 after a playing career involving a variety of lower league clubs, including Sheffield Wednesday, Mansfield Town, Notts County and Macclesfield Town. Club owner David Clowes added: “Paul is a man of great integrity and embodies the values we hold important at Derby County.
